title: Fancy PVP+
description: PvP/Bedwars pack that adds smallers swords, pickaxes, outlined blocks without too modifying Vanilla.
body:
![Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d9785cfa4d6ff3e0ad774cf7e4b43958edf2346.png)
Fancy PvP+ is a pack that enhances Bedwars and PvP experience without too modifying Vanilla Minecraft.
What does that adds?
## Outlined Blocks
![Outlined Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb12827414bb971b720f2cf4a687d20d14b2b1c.png)# 
Outlined Blocks! This pack adds outlined PvP/Bedwars blocks (like wool, end stone...) without too modifying them.
## Smaller Items
![Smaller Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e00f31d2729014e3b4d63262568078355cf42aa9.png)
Smaller Items! Useful to take up less space on the screen.

This packs is in beta, many things may changes. If you have any questions or suggestions, contact me on discord: legeekosaure13
